upload_failure.title: Wolta data upload failure
upload_failure.description: Wolta has been unable to upload energy data for more than 7 days. Last error: {error}. Check your internet connection and verify the integration is configured correctly.

user.title: Set up Wolta
user.description: Connect Wolta to Home Assistant to receive battery optimization grades and economy sensors.

data_description.battery_kwh: Usable battery capacity — the energy the battery can actually store and discharge. Not the rated/nameplate capacity.
data_description.cost_sek: Total purchase price for the battery (and any solar installation) in SEK. Used to calculate IRR and payback period. Optional.
data_description.purchase_date: Date the battery (or solar+battery) system was installed (YYYY-MM-DD). Used to calculate 'facit i år'. Optional.

entities.title: Select energy entities
entities.description: Select the energy sensors that measure your battery, grid and solar production. Battery and grid sensors are required; solar is optional.

privacy.title: Data & privacy
privacy.description: Your 15-minute energy data is stored at Wolta until you remove the integration. It is never shared unless you tick the contribution checkbox below.

data.share: Contribute anonymised data to improve Wolta

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Wolta
reauth_confirm.description: Your Wolta profile token has expired or been deleted. Confirm to create a new profile and re-link this integration.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Wolta API – check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_input: Invalid battery configuration – battery capacity and power must both be greater than zero.
error.rate_limited: Wolta API is currently rate-limiting requests – please try again later.
error.required_sensor: At least one sensor is required for this stream.

init.title: Wolta – economy settings
init.description: Update purchase price and purchase date to enable IRR, payback and 'facit i år' sensors. After saving, Wolta will trigger a recompute (may take up to 24 h if the server is on cooldown).

data_description.cost_sek: Total cost for the battery (and any solar installation) in SEK. Used to calculate IRR and payback period.
data_description.purchase_date: Date the battery (or solar+battery) system was installed. Used to calculate 'facit i år'.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Wolta API – check your internet connection and try again.
